title: Heatwave Alert Issued To 14 Mandals In Kakinada
description: District collector M.N. Harendhira Prasad said several mandals, including Tallarevu, Karapa, Kajuluru, Kakinada Urban, Kakinada Rural, Pithapuram, U. Kothapalli, Gollaprolu, Gandepalli, Jaggampeta, Kirlampudi, Pedapudi, Samalkot and Peddapuram, are expected to experience high temperatures.
